steps.title: Write the product
steps.content:
The other number is $84$ more than $x$, so it is $x+84$. The function gives the product of the two numbers.
$$f(x)=x(x+84)$$

steps.title: Expand the product
steps.content:
Distribute $x$ to both terms inside the parentheses.
$$x(x+84)=x^2+84x$$
So $f(x)=x^2+84x$. The answer is C.
